query:
UPDATE buyer_specs SET content = 'BUYER SPEC SHEETS FROM NOTION

## LCA Cost Plus 10/12/2025
Adspend - Affid: 503
Buyers: Combined
Adspend: $1K per day to start - 20% fee

Criteria: Depo-Provera users who developed brain tumors (meningioma). Must have used Depo-Provera (medroxyprogesterone acetate) for at least 1 year. Must have been diagnosed with meningioma. No statute of limitations issues.

---

## Pulaski Depo Specs
Depo-Provera Meningioma Criteria:
- PC must have used Depo-Provera (medroxyprogesterone acetate) as a contraceptive
- PC must have been diagnosed with a meningioma (brain tumor)
- Minimum 1 year of Depo-Provera use required
- Must have received at least one injection
- No prior brain tumor diagnosis before Depo use
- Statute of limitations: varies by state
- DQ: PC used other progestin-based contraceptives only (not Depo specifically)
- DQ: Meningioma diagnosed before Depo use began

---

## Affi CPA Buyer 48 - 15/04/2026
CPA buyer for Depo-Provera meningioma cases.
Key criteria: confirmed Depo-Provera use + meningioma diagnosis.

---

## Mass Tort Strategies
Depo-Provera posting specs - meningioma brain tumor cases only.
Requires: injection history + imaging-confirmed meningioma diagnosis.', updatedAt = NOW() WHERE buyerName = 'Depo-Provera';
